She's not lackluster, just difficult to use. She needs three stacks of Negentropy to Loop. You gain 1 per turn and 1 per card use with her rouse. Loop Defense is a cheaper, stronger version of normal Ramona's Assault Thesis. Sight Unbound is a more expensive search that also gives permanent strength, and the Loop version is normal Ramona's exalt in card form. There are more ways to manipulate the cost/effects of cards, so this can be a pro or a con. Her Exalt ranges from meh to insanity. She can change your Posse to whatever you need in a given situation while pulling back the last three cards played in the previous turn, reducing their cost by 1 with Exalt or to 0 with Over-exalt.

On the dmg side, Loop Strike hits 5 times and gives permanent crit rate scaling off her keyflare regen. This sets you up for Predetermined Strike which gains strength scaling every time you Posse, and with Loop you can either play it for free or make it go BOOM and exhaust.

Normal Ramona is a much simpler all-around support while Ryker is a more straight-forward draw and strength support. GRamona can do almost anything but requires significantly more setup and effort. Her utility also goes up every time they add a (useful) Posse to the game. For the Tawil pairing specifically, she can pull cards from Tawil's exalt back with her own exalt, swap your posse to/from the card duplication posse, and search for Tawil's Pinion/Wings (more expensive than Ryker but with Loop you can also grab from Discard).
